paper_title: Climate Data and Reconstruction Model Analysis

methods.description: Process for obtaining and preparing climate data from various sources for analysis, focusing on precipitation, temperature, and climate indices relevant to northwest Australian climate.

steps.description: We obtained the Climatic Research Unit's (CRU) precipitation and maximum temperature data (version 3.22) and the self-calibrating Palmer drought severity index (scPDSI, version 3.22) data from KNMI Climate Explorer.
steps.searchable_summary: download CRU precipitation and temperature data and scPDSI data from KNMI Climate Explorer

steps.description: Precipitation data from weather stations in the Pilbara region are strongly correlated (r > 0.80) with regionally-averaged CRU precipitation data showing that the CRU gridded data provide a reliable representation of instrumental climate records in the region.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze correlation between Pilbara weather station data and CRU precipitation data

steps.description: We also obtained data for broad-scale climate indices known to influence northwest Australian climate from KNMI Climate Explorer.
steps.searchable_summary: download broad-scale climate indices data from KNMI Climate Explorer

steps.description: We calculated a Ningaloo Niño index from anomalies of sea surface temperatures averaged over the region: 108°-116°E and 22°-28°S.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Ningaloo Niño index from SST anomalies

methods.description: Development and validation of a linear model to reconstruct summer-autumn precipitation using detrended ring-width chronology and various statistical tests.

steps.description: A linear model was used to reconstruct summer-autumn precipitation as a function of the detrended ring-width chronology.
steps.searchable_summary: develop linear model using detrended ring-width chronology to reconstruct precipitation

steps.description: Split-period calibration/verification analysis was used to test the robustness of the model.
steps.searchable_summary: perform split-period calibration/verification analysis on model

steps.description: Two rigorous tests of fit, the reduction of error (RE) and the coefficient of efficiency (CE) were used to verify the model.
steps.searchable_summary: verify model using RE and CE tests

steps.description: We then used the full period (1910-2012) of observed data to develop the final linear model to reconstruct summer-autumn precipitation back to 1802.
steps.searchable_summary: develop final linear model using full observed data period

steps.description: We rescaled the variance of the reconstructed data to match the variance of the instrumental data.
steps.searchable_summary: rescale variance of reconstructed data to match instrumental data
